critic_notes: IND.1 Prozessleit- und Automatisierungstechnik: 4 chapter-intro questions on OT/IT distinction, safety impact, definition, lifecycle. All quotes are located in the full source but OUTSIDE the manifest's declared IND.1 range — actual IND.1 chapter body begins around char 1977954 vs manifest char_start 2008141. This is a systemic manifest-boundary issue affecting ALL IND.* chapters in this batch. Quote 004 additionally spans a PDF page break with injected page-header boilerplate; matches under combined aggressive + page-header-stripped normalization. All baustein_id values are chapter-level (IND.1) with null anforderung_type — acceptable for chapter-overview content. `experte` on 001/004 appropriate for synthesis of OT/IT contrasts.
